summary: The session focused on the reasons why users give Reddit Gold to admins on the Reddit platform. It highlighted the benefits of Reddit Gold membership and the appreciation users have for the contributions of admins in maintaining the community.
facts: Reddit Gold is a premium membership program offered by Reddit, a social news and discussion website. Users can give Reddit Gold to other users, including admins, as a way of thanking them for their contributions to the community. Reddit Gold members receive perks such as the ability to turn off ads, access to a special subreddit for Gold members, and the ability to use custom emoji in comments and posts. Admins on Reddit are volunteers or employees who help to moderate and manage the site. Giving Reddit Gold to admins is a way for users to show appreciation for their hard work and dedication in maintaining the quality and integrity of the site.
